response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional technical depth, open-source contributions, and cross-platform experience, but lacks demonstrated leadership in IT architecture, UML modeling, and team management at an executive level, and his German proficiency is only basic — a critical requirement for this role.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack expertise across diverse technologies (DLang, Node.js, TypeScript, Linux)
Strong track record of mentoring and teaching via workshops and community initiatives
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, falling short of the required C1 level
No clear evidence of formal IT architecture design, UML modeling, or project leadership experience
Lacks documented experience in client advisory, requirements management, or compliance/risk frameworks
